privileged_info_summary: The task requires adding a synthetic IT asset into the ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus Asset Management module. The target asset name 'WKST-FINANCE-042', asset type 'Workstation', product type 'Computer', vendor 'Dell Technologies', serial number 'DLL7X9K2P4', and location 'Finance Department' explicitly match the instructions provided in the task description.
